title: Threshold Calibration: Set Evidence Gate Threshold
description: Analyze score distributions from IMPL-006 eval results. Set evidence gate threshold using conservative_95 strategy. Re-run eval to verify.
acceptance_criteria: Threshold selected from eval score distribution analysis
Using conservative_95 strategy: threshold captures 95% of correct-answer scores
Zero false-positive validation: no wrong answers pass the gate
Safety margin of 0.03-0.05 applied above zero-FP threshold
Re-run eval confirms gate behavior matches expectations
Abstention rate documented for launch communication
implementation_steps: 0. MANDATORY READS: Read all files listed in agents_compliance.mandatory_reads BEFORE any changes
1. Load score distributions from IMPL-006 results
2. Compute threshold candidates: conservative_95, balanced, aggressive
3. Select conservative_95 threshold with safety margin
4. Validate: zero false-positives on eval dataset
6. Re-run eval to verify gate behavior
7. Document abstention rate for launch communication
8. /review: Review threshold decision before marking complete

agents_compliance.reason: Modifies system-config true source (data/system_config.json). Threshold selection is a high-risk decision affecting chat behavior. Per coding-rules.md: config changes must go through system_config_service.py true source.

brain_tasks: Analyze score distributions and select threshold
Review threshold decision (Brain MUST make this call)
